positive: A majestic, symmetrical celestial botanical arrangement. Focus on oversized, stylized flora (peonies, moons, star clusters) interwoven with glowing cosmic dust trails and nebulae patterns. The color palette is limited to deep midnight blues, vibrant teal, ethereal lavender, and stark metallic gold accents. The composition should feature a central, repeating mandala-like pattern with clean, thick-lined silhouettes that are highly visible and scalable. The overall style is highly illustrative, mixing Art Nouveau curvature with cosmic scientific sketch aesthetics. Clean edges, high contrast, suitable for repeat pattern tiling, vector quality.
negative: blurry, smudge, text, watermark, signature, low quality, noisy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, realism, photorealistic, logos, grunge, sketch lines, distracting background elements
